allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = [] for line in sys.stdin: try: obj = json.loads\(line.strip\(\)\) if obj.get\(''type''\) == ''summary'': print\(''=== SUMMARY ===''\) print\(obj.get\(''summary'', ''''\)\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: try: obj = json.loads\(line.strip\(\)\) role = obj.get\(''role'', ''''\) if role in \(''user'', ''assistant''\): msg = obj.get\(''message'', {}\) if isinstance\(msg, dict\): content = msg.get\(''content'', ''''\) if isinstance\(content, str\) and len\(content\) > 20: print\(f''[{role}]: {content[:200]}''\) elif isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\(''type''\) == ''text'' and len\(c.get\(''text'',''''\)\) > 20: print\(f''[{role}]: {c[""text""][:200]}''\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys with open\(''/Users/danil/.claude/projects/-Users-danil-Desktop-project/23470fb8-fb7f-45cf-86ab-bcbbac663492.jsonl''\) as f: for line in f: line = line.strip\(\) if not line: continue try: obj = json.loads\(line\) except: continue # Check various message structures if ''role'' in obj: print\(f''ROLE: {obj[""role""]}''\) if ''type'' in obj: print\(f''TYPE: {obj[""type""]}''\) if ''message'' in obj: msg = obj[''message''] if isinstance\(msg, str\): print\(f''MSG: {msg[:150]}''\) elif isinstance\(msg, dict\): for k in msg: v = msg[k] if isinstance\(v, str\) and len\(v\) > 10: print\(f''MSG.{k}: {str\(v\)[:150]}''\) elif isinstance\(v, list\): for item in v: if isinstance\(item, dict\) and ''text'' in item: print\(f''MSG_TEXT: {item[""text""][:200]}''\) ")
